title: System settings
subtitle: Manage platform-wide services. Changes take effect immediately and are audited.

email.configured: Email notifications are ready to send
email.notConfigured: Configure SMTP to enable email notification channels
email.transportHint: Shared by alert notifications and future platform emails.
email.passwordHint: The password is encrypted with the platform key and is never returned to the browser.
email.testHint: Save settings, then verify connection and delivery to an address.

monitoring.statusHint: The Monitor scheduler dispatches tasks and the Worker collects metrics and evaluates alerts.
monitoring.intervalHint: Runs continuously in production without manual collection.
monitoring.retentionHint: Expired minute snapshots are removed by the collector.
monitoring.rangesHint: Detail charts automatically downsample longer time ranges.
monitoring.privacyHint: Only normalized routes, status codes, latency, and aggregate counts are stored—never request parameters, bodies, or responses.
